# 001 YAML Surface

Status: draft
Source of truth: libs/api/workflow-language/src/core/surface/surface-workflow-document.ts

## Purpose

Describe the author-facing YAML document accepted by PR1.

This document tracks compatibility constraints for the surface schema owned by workflow-language.

## Normative Model

- A workflow document has a required non-empty `name`.

- `jobs` is a map keyed by job name.

- `triggers` remains an optional map keyed by trigger name.

- `runner`, job `runner`, and job `needs` accept either a string or a string array.

<!-- generated by libs/api/workflow-language/scripts/generate-formalization-docs.ts; do not edit generated sections directly -->
<!-- generated:start -->
- Canonical DTO surface schema: `surfaceWorkflowDocumentSchema`.

- Canonical DTO surface type: `SurfaceWorkflowDocumentDto`.

- Canonical YAML parser: `parseYamlSurfaceWorkflowDocument`.

- Surface compatibility mode: required workflow name, trigger map, HTTP `definition` field, SQL `definition` column.

- Validate-route compatibility mode: response field `spec` and error code `invalid-definition-spec` remain stable.
<!-- generated:end -->

## Examples

A minimal document declares `name` and one job with at least one `run` step.

## Adding Or Changing This Concept

Update the Zod schema, CUE formalization artifact, examples, compatibility tests, and generated docs together.
